data.title: Bitcoin Dips Below $80K as Crypto Sell-Off Goes From Bad to Worse
data.description:
• Crypto's weak start of the week had BTC dropping below $80,000 and Ethereum's ETH briefly sliding below $2,000. Solana's SOL, Cardano's ADA, Aptos' APT, Avalanche's AVAX and NEAR fell 7%-10% over he past 24 hours.
  • The downturn in crypto markets coincided with a sharp decline in U.S. equity indices, with crypto equities such as Strategy (MSTR) and Coinbase (COIN) tanking 10%.
  • The crypto market is currently lacking near-term positive catalysts and is being impacted by macroeconomic headwinds of a potential tariff war and a slowing economy.

data.title: Billionaire Winklevoss Twins-Backed Gemini Confidentially Filed for a U.S IPO: Bloomberg
data.description:
• Crypto exchange Gemini, founded by the Winklevoss twins, has confidentially filed for an IPO, with Goldman Sachs and Citigroup involved in the process.
  • The potential IPO follows the SEC's decision to end its investigation into Gemini without taking action, and a $5 million settlement of a separate lawsuit by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission.
  • Gemini joins several other crypto firms, including Kraken, Circle, Bullish, and Blockchain.com, that are considering U.S. public listings amid a retreat from full-scale litigation by the SEC.

data.title: U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, Crypto Stockpile a 'Pivotal Moment' for Industry: KBW
data.description:
• The executive order calling for the formation of a strategic bitcoin reserve and digital asset stockpile is a pivotal moment for the crypto industry, the report said.
  • KBW said bitcoin is being exclusively treated as a reserve asset.
  • The government could form partnerships with U.S. miners to receive bitcoin royalties in exchange for tax breaks.

data.title: Rex Shares and Osprey Funds File for MOVE ETF
data.description:
• The ETF would track the price performance of Movement (MOVE), an Ethereum layer-2 network built using MoveVM.
  • Rex Shares and Osprey Funds have previously filed ETFs with exposure to memecoins like TRUMP, BONK, and DOGE.

data.title: XRP Bulls Need to Defend Near $2 Support After the Largest Price Drop Since November 2022. Here's Why.
data.description:
• XRP, the cryptocurrency used by Ripple, experienced a significant drop of over 27% in the week ending March 9, marking its largest weekly decline since November 2022.
  • Key support closer to $2, if breached, could lead to further losses. This level has been forming a head-and-shoulders (H&S) topping pattern since December.

data.title: Strategy Announces $21B Preferred ATM Offering to Buy More Bitcoin
data.description:
• Michael Saylor's Strategy (MSTR) Monday morning launched a $21B at-the-market offering of its preferred stock (STRK).
  • In the doldrums after another panicky Sunday decline, bitcoin (BTC) rose about $1,000 to above $83,000 on the news.
  • Strategy currently holds just under 500,000 bitcoin.

data.title: Crypto Equities Slide in Pre-Market After Bitcoin Falls to $80K
data.description:
• Cryptocurrency's extended sell-off bled through to equity markets on Monday as crypto-adjacent companies saw losses in pre-market trading.
  • Strategy (MSTR) and Coinbase (COIN) both fell over 5% in pre-market.

data.title: Deja Vu Grips Crypto Market as BTC Mirrors Price Action Seen After U.S. Bitcoin ETF Launch: Van Straten
data.description:
• Bitcoin hit a local top after the U.S. ETF launch in January 2024 and President Trump’s inauguration in January 2025, with both events followed by a market correction.
  • Bitcoin is currently undergoing a 30% correction, while the U.S. ETF launch saw a 20% correction.

data.title: Singapore Exchange Plans to Launch Bitcoin Perpetual Futures in 2025: Report
data.description:
• SGX's bitcoin perpetual futures will cater exclusively to institutional clients and professional investors.
  • The contracts, pending regulatory approval, aim to provide a secure and trusted trading option in the growing crypto market.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Tops $200B as U.S. Sees Industry Helping Maintain Dollar Dominance
data.description:
• Aggregate stablecoin supply surpasses $200 billion.
  • USDC nears $60 billion market cap, gaining $25 billion since the U.S. election.
  • Tether remains a major holder of 3-month U.S. Treasuries as China and Japan offload U.S. paper.
